summary: Frontend testing complete for photo upload/delete independence from form validation. Fixed critical bug where frontend was sending 'photo' field but backend expected 'file'. All 7 features verified working after fix.

bug_fixed.issue: Photo upload was failing with 422 'Field required' error
bug_fixed.root_cause: Frontend ProfileTab.js was sending FormData with field name 'photo' but backend photos.py expected field name 'file'
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed line 141 in ProfileTab.js from formDataUpload.append('photo', file) to formDataUpload.append('file', file)

photo_upload_independence.test: Uploaded photo with empty bio and my_type fields
photo_upload_independence.result: 'Photo saved!' toast appeared without triggering form validation

photo_delete_independence.test: Deleted photo with empty text fields
photo_delete_independence.result: 'Photo removed' toast appeared without triggering form validation

save_button_bio_validation.toast_message: Add a short line so people get a sense of your vibe.

save_button_my_type_validation.toast_message: Tell us a bit more about who you click with (at least 10 characters).

save_button_success.test: Clicked Save with valid bio and my_type

photo_ui_state_update.test: Photo appears in UI after upload, disappears after delete
photo_ui_state_update.result: UI state correctly reflects photo changes

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix applied: Changed 'photo' to 'file' in FormData for photo upload (line 141)
Photo upload/delete now correctly bypasses form validation
Save button correctly validates only text fields (bio, my_type_of_person)
Auto-saved indicator visible in photo section
All data-testid attributes present for testing

success_rate.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing (backend verified by main agent via curl)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload/delete independence from form validation verified. Fixed bug where FormData field name was 'photo' instead of 'file'. All photo operations now work independently without triggering Save button validation. Save button correctly validates only text fields (bio, my_type_of_person).
